rule.description: Arcenum [MEDIUM]: Firewall denied connection - Attacker performing port scan to map attack surface (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: Firewall dropped packet - Attacker sweeping network for active hosts and vulnerable services (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: DNS named activity - Attacker exfiltrating data or beaconing via DNS tunneling (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: DNS query activity - Attacker malware using Domain Generation Algorithms (DGA) for C2 connection (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: Connection on known C2 port 4444 - Attacker establishing standard Metasploit/Cobalt Strike reverse shell (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: Connection on known C2 port 31337 - Attacker establishing connection via known backdoor/trojan port (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: SMB port 445 activity - Attacker moving laterally using SMB/PsExec across the network (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: RDP port 3389 activity - Attacker moving laterally via remote desktop access (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: FTP outbound connection - Attacker exfiltrating sensitive files via unencrypted protocol (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [HIGH]: Tor client activity - Attacker using Tor network for anonymized C2 communication and defense evasion (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
Arcenum [MEDIUM]: Tor port 9050 usage in network traffic - Attacker proxying traffic to hide origin (© 2024 Pradhyumna Ghogare / Arcenum Systems)
